text:
The 10 worst things Trump has done in his second term:

1. US lost measles elimination status. Children died.
2. Invaded Venezuela without notifying Congress.
3. Defied a Supreme Court ruling on tariffs.
4. Started a war with Iran. Bombed a school.
5. Pardoned 1,500+ Jan 6 rioters including cop-beaters.
6. Arrested journalists Don Lemon and Georgia Fort.
7. Fired 20,000+ public health workers.
8. Cut $1 trillion from Medicaid/Medicare.
9. Let the nuclear arms treaty expire with no replacement.
10. His DOJ deleted an Epstein file naming Trump after it went viral.

All documented. All sourced.
